name: デュエル・マスターズ プレイス

detail.description:
"Duel Masters" is now available as an app!
Have an exciting duel anytime, anywhere, with anyone!
Let's start another duema!

■Duema after all!
Shield break with trump creature!
Great reversal with shield trigger!
The exciting duema is now in your hands!

■Let's have fun in battle!
Aim for victory over and over again, Duel Master! "Rank match"!
Feel free to compete in Duema! "Casual Match"!
It's a place with various battles, so it's up to you how you enjoy it!

■Solo mode is also great!
Exciting
